## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs or explained why docs are not needed.
- [ ] I updated OpenAPI sources if public API shape changed.
- [ ] I checked MCP read-only/privacy boundaries if MCP behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated Agent Skills if MCP tools, filters, metrics, or guidance changed.
- [ ] I checked GoAI structured-output validation if AI provider or Opportunity behavior changed.
- [ ] I checked the diff for secrets, private deployment details, local-only paths, and customer data.
